name: Femininizing your Step-Bro

Jokes on him, you don't just have a Big Dick/Strap, no-no-no... You have a fucking Monster, a "Javelin", "Excalibur, Penis/Strap edition". You get the idea...

And your Lil' Step-Bro can't just be walking around all that ass and not expect someone to try and put him in his place.

So make him into your Femininized Slut.
